nav.dropdownTitle: Digitalize every HR process with AiRX

hero.title: Mobile Attendance & HR Management,
hero.subtitle: 14 modules, one subscription. No biometric hardware — same-day setup.
hero.entryWifiInfo: When employees connect to the corporate network, attendance can be completed quickly and contactlessly with network-based validation.
hero.entryNfcInfo: Using the phone's NFC capability, you can create secure clock-in and clock-out records in seconds without physical contact.
hero.entryRemoteInfo: Field teams or remote staff can submit verified attendance from their mobile devices wherever they are working.
hero.entryQrInfo: By scanning a QR code placed at the branch, gate or turnstile, attendance is managed practically with low hardware cost.
hero.entryBeaconInfo: With beacon support, employee presence near specific areas can be detected and the entry experience can be automated.

modulesSection.title: Everything in
modulesSection.subtitle: Modules purpose-built for every area of HR management, all under one roof.

pdks.name: Attendance Management
pdks.desc: Track employee clock-ins and clock-outs via the mobile app. No biometric devices required — QR code completes the process in seconds.

ozlukDosyasi.name: Personnel File
ozlukDosyasi.desc: Store and manage all employee records digitally. Document upload, personnel tracking, and archiving all in one screen.

izinYonetimi.name: Leave Management
izinYonetimi.desc: Manage employee leave requests with a digital approval workflow. Annual leave balances are calculated automatically.

puantaj.name: Payroll
puantaj.desc: Automatically generate monthly timesheets with work hours and attendance status. Get payroll-ready output instantly.

erisimKontrolu.name: Access Control
erisimKontrolu.desc: Digitally manage building and department access. Define which employees can access which zones and maintain real-time records.

ziyaretciYonetimi.name: Visitor Management
ziyaretciYonetimi.desc: Register visitors coming to your organization. Track visit purpose, host, and duration digitally.

yemekhane.name: Cafeteria Management
yemekhane.desc: Track employee meal usage and menu preferences digitally. Analyze cafeteria costs and reduce waste.

anket.name: Surveys
anket.desc: Easily create surveys for employee satisfaction, internal communication, and feedback. Analyze results in real time.

sureligEvraklar.name: Expiring Documents
sureligEvraklar.desc: Track time-sensitive documents (driver license, certificate, contract, etc.). Get automatic alerts before they expire.

egitimPlanlama.name: Training Planning
egitimPlanlama.desc: Create employee training plans, track participation, and generate training completion reports.

hukukiEvraklar.name: Legal Documents
hukukiEvraklar.desc: Store employment contracts, confidentiality agreements, and legal documents in a secure digital archive.

yanHaklar.name: Benefits
yanHaklar.desc: Define and track employee benefits (private health insurance, vehicle, phone, etc.) on a per-person basis.

periyodikGorev.name: Periodic Tasks
periyodikGorev.desc: Automatically create recurring tasks on a regular schedule. Track completion status and get alerts for delays.

isZekasi.name: Business Intelligence
isZekasi.desc: Visualize all your HR data in a single dashboard. Monitor attendance, leave, performance, and cost analytics in real time.

whyAirx.sectionTitle: A Platform That Makes a Difference
whyAirx.sectionSubtitle: No unnecessary complexity. Secure, user-friendly HR management tailored to your organization.
whyAirx.value1Text: We design screens that accelerate your HR team's day, not complicate it. Every step is built for fewer clicks and smarter decisions.
whyAirx.value2Text: We treat GDPR compliance as a core principle, not an afterthought. Secure operations without biometric data collection.
whyAirx.value3Text: For us, post-deployment is where the real work begins. Training, support, and product development are all part of the same journey.
whyAirx.principle4: Aligned with local regulations and needs
whyAirx.card1Desc: No fingerprint, face recognition, or retina scanning. Your employees personal biometric data never enters the system. A mobile QR code is enough.
whyAirx.card2Desc: With the iOS and Android app, employees handle all their tasks from their smartphones.
whyAirx.card3Desc: No extra hardware required. Set up the system in one day and start using it immediately.
whyAirx.card4Desc: Make instant decisions with dashboards, charts, and customizable reports.
whyAirx.card5Desc: From a 10-person business to a 10,000-person organization. Scales with you as you grow.

security.title: Your Data Is Always Secure
security.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security infrastructure, legal compliance, and transparent data management.
security.pillar1Desc: Fingerprints, facial recognition, or retina data are never processed or stored.
security.pillar2Desc: All data processing activities comply with legal requirements under the Personal Data Protection Law.
security.pillar3Desc: All data transfers are protected with end-to-end SSL/TLS encryption. Plain-text transmission is strictly prevented.
security.pillar4Desc: All data is stored in secure data centers in Turkey. No transfer outside the country takes place.

howItWorks.subtitle: No technical knowledge required. Start today.
howItWorks.step1Desc: We evaluate your needs and organization structure together. We prepare a customized presentation for you.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add your organization structure, locations, and personnel to the system. Configure modules to match your workflow.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Manage all your HR processes from the web panel and mobile app. Make decisions with real-time data.

faq.headerSubtitle: We've compiled the most common questions about AiRX.
faq.sidebarDesc: Discuss your specific situation with our team and we'll find the best solution together.
faq.a1: AiRX setup is typically completed within 1 business day. Our team will assist you in importing your organization structure and employee data into the system. No hardware purchase is required.
faq.q2: Do I need to buy biometric devices?
faq.a2: No. AiRX does not require biometric devices. Employees can clock in/out via QR code or NFC through the mobile app on their smartphones.
faq.q3: How many users is it suitable for?
faq.a3: AiRX can be used at any scale, from small businesses with 10 people to large organizations with 10,000+ employees. Flexible pricing options are available based on the number of users.
faq.a4: AiRX operates in full compliance with personal data processing regulations. No biometric data is collected, all data is stored in secure data centers, and a data processing agreement is signed.
faq.q5: Which devices does the mobile app support?
faq.a5: The AiRX mobile app works on iOS (iPhone) and Android devices. The web panel can be accessed from any browser.
faq.q6: Can we migrate from our existing HR system?
faq.a6: Yes. Our team will assist you with data migration and transition from your existing system. Employee data in Excel and CSV formats can be easily imported into the system.

mobileApp.sectionSubtitle: With the iOS and Android app, your employees can clock in/out, request leave, and view their tasks. Managers can approve everything from mobile.
mobileApp.feature1: Instant clock in/out via mobile QR code
mobileApp.feature2: Leave requests and instant approval notifications

cta.sectionSubtitle: More than 150 organizations manage all their HR processes on a single platform with AiRX. Discover it with a free demo.
cta.testimonial: By easily tracking employee break times and locations, and regulating overtime, it provided us with considerable convenience.

footer.description: Turkey's mobile-first HR management platform. Full GDPR compliance without biometric data collection.
footer.hcDescription: AiRX is a next-generation HR product developed by HC Dijital.

contact.step1: We listen to your needs and current operations structure.
contact.step2: We share the right module set and implementation approach for you.
contact.step3: We clarify the migration plan together after the demo.

contact.formTitle: Let our team share the right solution for you
contact.formSubtitle: We will evaluate your module needs, user structure and implementation expectations together.
contact.formInfoText: Once you submit the form, our product experts contact you and evaluate your module needs, user structure and implementation expectations together.
contact.fieldMessagePlaceholder: You can briefly share your organization structure and needs.
contact.kvkkNote: Your personal data is protected under KVKK.
contact.faqSubtitle: We have compiled a few frequently asked questions to help before your first conversation.
contact.faq1q: How long does a demo take?
contact.faq1a: It varies by your organization, but a standard product demo is typically completed within 30-45 minutes.
contact.faq2q: Is additional hardware required for setup?
contact.faq2a: No. AiRX can be deployed without hardware requirements and is adapted to your existing processes.
contact.faq3q: How does the quoting process work?

contact.faq4q: Which industries do you work with?
contact.faq4a: We work with all organizations that have staff operations, including manufacturing, retail, healthcare, logistics and services.
contact.ctaTitle: Let's find the right package for you.

whyPage.heroSubtitle: HR management without biometric data risk, hardware cost, or foreign support queues. Exactly how it should be.
whyPage.compareSubtitle: We don't belittle our competitors — we just show the difference.
whyPage.pillarsSubtitle: Small details make a big difference. AiRX demonstrates this in every feature.
whyPage.pillar1Title: No Biometric Data, Full GDPR Compliance
whyPage.pillar1Body: Fingerprints, facial scans or retina data never enter the system. Mobile QR code handles everything; your employees' privacy is protected.
whyPage.pillar2Body: No need to order extra hardware. Set up your system in one business day, start using it the same day. Other solutions take weeks.
whyPage.pillar3Body: From attendance to cafeteria, from leave management to business intelligence — manage all your HR processes on a single platform without separate budgets for separate licenses.
whyPage.pillar4Body: No getting lost in foreign support portals. Our Turkish-speaking, Turkey-based support team is instantly at your side.
whyPage.pillar5Body: Same platform, same experience from small business to large enterprise. As your team grows, AiRX grows too — no reinstallation required.
whyPage.pillar6Body: SGK, GDPR, local legislation — all considered from the start. No wasted time adapting foreign software to local needs.
whyPage.quoteBody: The wrong choice means biometric data risks, years-long implementations and support teams who speak no Turkish. AiRX was designed to solve these problems from the ground up.

about.heroSubtitle: AiRX was developed to reduce the operational burden of HR teams while improving employee experience. Our goal: to offer a mobile-first, legally compliant structure that unifies scattered processes on a single platform.
about.cardQuote: Not a single module, but a working HR ecosystem.
about.principle1: Secure operation without biometric data collection
about.principle4: Compliance with Turkish regulations and local needs
about.valuesSectionTitle: A team as clear in approach as in product
about.valuesSectionSubtitle: When developing AiRX, we focus not only on the feature list but on how institutions really work. We shape every decision around a few core principles.
about.value1Text: We design screens that speed up HR teams' days, not complicate them. Every step is structured for fewer clicks and clearer decisions.
about.value2Text: We treat GDPR compliance not as a layer added at the end of the product, but as the core principle of the system. Secure operation without biometric data collection.
about.value3Text: The period after installation is the real beginning for us. We see training, support and product development as part of the same journey.
about.storyQuote: We wanted not just to digitize HR operations, but to simplify them.
about.storyBody: AiRX was designed as an experience that works together for HR, managers and employees — not separately. Every improvement that reduces complex processes is the clearest indicator of product success for us.
about.milestone1Title: We listened to real needs in the field
about.milestone1Text: AiRX was shaped not from desk assumptions, but to solve real operational problems experienced in shift, leave, payroll and access processes.
about.milestone2Title: A connected experience on one platform
about.milestone2Text: We bring together different HR operations from leave management to visitor processes on a single screen, in a single data flow.
about.milestone3Text: We're building a platform that not only keeps records, but generates recommendations for managers and enables teams to take action faster.
about.ctaTitle: If you're curious about AiRX, our team will be happy to explain the platform to you.
about.ctaSubtitle: Let us listen to your processes and set up the right workflow together. Contact our team for a demo, setup approach and module structure.

modulePage.summary1: Standardizes the operation flow and reduces the daily control burden.

modulePage.summary3: Makes processes measurable and supports managerial decision quality.

ik7.excerpt: The critical questions you must ask during the procurement process to choose the right HR platform from dozens of options.

pdks.name: Attendance (PDKS)
pdks.description: AiRX PDKS consists of integrated mobile software, a web management panel, and high-tech hardware. You can track both employee check-ins/check-outs and time spent at specific locations. All your employees need to do is install our mobile app.
pdks.feat1Desc: You can centrally manage employee check-ins and check-outs via the mobile app, web panel, and integrated hardware.
pdks.feat2Desc: Track the time employees spend at specific locations and generate duration reports for areas such as the cafeteria.
pdks.feat3Desc: Set up usage scenarios suited to field needs with 5 entry/exit methods: Beacon, NFC, WiFi, QR code, and Remote.
pdks.benefit1: Track employee check-ins and check-outs from a single system
pdks.benefit2: Measure time spent at specific locations
pdks.benefit3: Adapt to field requirements with 5 different entry methods
pdks.benefit4: Get up and running quickly with just the mobile app

erisim_kontrolu.name: Access Control
erisim_kontrolu.description: Premises and turnstiles are kept under control so only authorized individuals can enter. Using our QR device, you can authorize entry and exit via the mobile app with QR codes that refresh every 30 seconds, and generate reports of these records.
erisim_kontrolu.feat1Desc: You can keep premises and turnstiles under control so that only authorized individuals can enter, ensuring access areas are managed clearly and securely.
erisim_kontrolu.feat2Desc: Using our QR device, you can authorize entry and exit via the mobile app. The process is both fast and centrally manageable.
erisim_kontrolu.feat3Desc: QR codes in the mobile app refresh every 30 seconds. This structure enhances access security and reduces the risk of unauthorized use.
erisim_kontrolu.benefit1: Ensure only authorized personnel can enter
erisim_kontrolu.benefit2: Boost security with QR codes refreshed every 30 seconds
erisim_kontrolu.benefit3: Centrally manage turnstile and area access
erisim_kontrolu.benefit4: Simplify audits by reporting all movements

sureli_evraklar.name: Expiring Documents
sureli_evraklar.description: Keep documents with expiry dates under control. Upload time-limited documents such as health check certificates and authorization papers for your employees, and stay informed before they expire.
sureli_evraklar.feat1Desc: Track all documents with validity periods in the system and keep the deadlines of critical documents under control.
sureli_evraklar.feat2Desc: Upload your employees' health check documents to the system and be informed in advance about documents nearing expiry.
sureli_evraklar.feat3Desc: Systematically archive authorization documents tied to roles and responsibilities, and track documents nearing expiry in real time.
sureli_evraklar.benefit1: Manage all expiring documents from a single location
sureli_evraklar.benefit2: Track health check and authorization documents regularly
sureli_evraklar.benefit3: Be notified in advance of documents nearing expiry
sureli_evraklar.benefit4: Manage document renewal processes more efficiently

periyodik_gorev.name: Periodic Tasks
periyodik_gorev.description: Create periodic or one-time tasks and track location accuracy for where those tasks need to be performed. Verify through the app that tasks were completed, done in the correct location, and that checklists were finished.
periyodik_gorev.feat1Desc: Create periodic or one-time tasks and assign them to the relevant people. All task processes are managed from a single panel.
periyodik_gorev.feat2Desc: Assign tasks to specific individuals and clearly plan who will do which task and when.
periyodik_gorev.feat3Desc: You can require that an employee be at the relevant location in order to mark a task as completed, verifying that tasks are done in the right place.
periyodik_gorev.benefit1: Manage periodic and one-time tasks from a single system
periyodik_gorev.benefit2: Verify that tasks are completed at the correct location
periyodik_gorev.benefit3: Improve process completion quality with checklists
periyodik_gorev.benefit4: Centrally manage field operations through the app

ozluk_dosyasi.name: Employee Records
ozluk_dosyasi.description: With AiRX, store employee files digitally in a current and complete manner. All official documents and records such as employment contracts, recruitment and leave documents, financial records, documents obtained during employment, assignment and overtime forms can be stored in the online system.
ozluk_dosyasi.feat1Desc: Keep all employee documents current and complete in a digital environment from the moment of hiring through the entire employment period.
ozluk_dosyasi.feat2Title: All Official Documents in One Place
ozluk_dosyasi.feat2Desc: Store all official documents and records — employment contracts, recruitment and leave documents, financial records, assignment and overtime forms — in a single system.
ozluk_dosyasi.feat3Desc: Employee documents can be stored in the online system verified with a biometric signature, creating a reliable record infrastructure.
ozluk_dosyasi.benefit1: Keep employee files current and complete in a digital environment
ozluk_dosyasi.benefit2: Protect personal data with GDPR-compliant storage
ozluk_dosyasi.benefit3: Quickly access any document you need
ozluk_dosyasi.benefit4: Save time and costs for HR teams

ziyaretci_yonetimi.name: Visitor Management
ziyaretci_yonetimi.description: End the era of collecting IDs and handing out cards to visitors. Simply ask for their phone number and grant entry permission to authorized doors or turnstiles via a QR code sent by SMS.
ziyaretci_yonetimi.feat1Desc: Eliminate the processes of collecting IDs and handing out physical cards for visitor entry, providing a faster and more modern experience.
ziyaretci_yonetimi.feat2Desc: Start the registration process by only asking for the visitor's phone number, making the entry flow much more practical.
ziyaretci_yonetimi.feat3Desc: A QR code sent to the visitor via SMS enables secure access permission to authorized areas.
ziyaretci_yonetimi.benefit1: Eliminate the process of collecting IDs and handing out cards
ziyaretci_yonetimi.benefit2: Start visitor entry with just a phone number
ziyaretci_yonetimi.benefit3: Authorize doors and turnstiles via QR
ziyaretci_yonetimi.benefit4: Enable controlled visitor access even through standard office doors

yemekhane.name: Cafeteria
yemekhane.description: You can manage staff meal entitlement control. Define monthly meal entitlements for your employees and track cafeteria entries based on those entitlements as they pass through cafeteria turnstiles.
yemekhane.feat1Desc: Define monthly meal entitlements for your employees and manage individual usage limits from the system.
yemekhane.feat2Desc: Track employees' cafeteria turnstile passages in line with their defined entitlements and record entry movements.
yemekhane.feat3Desc: Control the passage of employees who have no meal entitlement or have exhausted their allowance, and digitally manage usage rules.
yemekhane.benefit1: Manage employee meal entitlements on a monthly basis
yemekhane.benefit3: Make entitlement usage visible on a per-person basis

anket.name: Survey
anket.tagline: Generate Insights by Surveying Your Staff
anket.description: Turn the questions you want to ask your employees into surveys and analyze the results. You can also use this data to analyze other data.
anket.feat1Desc: Easily convert the questions you want to ask your employees into surveys and create a regular feedback flow.
anket.feat2Desc: Examine survey results to gain clearer visibility into employee trends, expectations, and the internal state of the organization.
anket.feat3Desc: Use collected responses to create meaningful insights for your organization and support decision-making processes with data.
anket.benefit1: Convert employee questions into measurable surveys
anket.benefit3: Evaluate survey data alongside other data

egitim_planlama.name: Training Planning
egitim_planlama.description: Plan trainings and announce them to your staff. You can plan training sessions, communicate them to relevant employees, and confirm attendance status after the training.
egitim_planlama.feat1Desc: You can plan in-house trainings and organize which training will take place and when through the system.
egitim_planlama.feat2Desc: Communicate planned trainings to relevant employees and clearly identify who needs to attend.
egitim_planlama.feat3Desc: After the training, record employees' attendance status and confirm completed trainings.
egitim_planlama.benefit1: Manage training plans in an organized manner
egitim_planlama.benefit2: Easily communicate training announcements to relevant staff
egitim_planlama.benefit3: Record attendance status after each training
egitim_planlama.benefit4: Manage planning and tracking from a single panel

hukuki_evraklar.name: Legal Documents
hukuki_evraklar.tagline: Bring Warnings and Defenses to the Digital Environment
hukuki_evraklar.description: Warnings and defenses are managed digitally. Record issued warnings and received defenses to use in analyses.
hukuki_evraklar.feat1Desc: Record issued warnings in the system in an organized manner and track historical records on a per-employee basis.
hukuki_evraklar.feat2Desc: Store received defenses in a digital environment and manage them together with the relevant employee records.
hukuki_evraklar.feat3Desc: Store warning and defense documents in an organized digital environment without the need for physical tracking.
hukuki_evraklar.benefit1: Store warnings and defenses in an organized digital environment
hukuki_evraklar.benefit2: Simplify legal document tracking per employee
hukuki_evraklar.benefit3: Use historical records in analysis processes
hukuki_evraklar.benefit4: Increase process visibility with a centralized record structure

yan_haklar.name: Fringe Benefits
yan_haklar.description: Automate the processes of granting and revoking fringe benefits given to employees. Define benefits by role, see which benefits new hires should receive, and check off what has been assigned.
yan_haklar.feat1Desc: Define which fringe benefits each role requires and create standard benefit sets tied to positions.
yan_haklar.feat2Desc: See which fringe benefits need to be given to a new employee based on their role through the system, ensuring nothing is missed.
yan_haklar.feat3Desc: Mark benefits delivered to employees to keep process tracking organized and easily verify which benefits have been provided.
yan_haklar.benefit1: Standardize benefit assignment processes by role
yan_haklar.benefit2: Reduce the risk of missed deliveries for new hires
yan_haklar.benefit3: Make benefits that need to be reclaimed at offboarding visible
yan_haklar.benefit4: Digitally record delivery and retrieval processes

izin_yonetimi.name: Leave Management
izin_yonetimi.description: Manage employee leave with approval mechanisms using AiRX. Eliminate paper forms during leave requests and planning, prevent leave conflicts, and activate approval mechanisms.
izin_yonetimi.feat1Desc: Manage employee leave requests and leave planning digitally, eliminating paper forms.
izin_yonetimi.feat2Desc: Adapt all leave options — paid, unpaid, and approval-required — to the system using leave types defined according to user needs.
izin_yonetimi.feat3Desc: Define different approval mechanisms for each leave type and adapt employee leave tracking to your organizational structure.
izin_yonetimi.benefit1: Digitize the leave process by eliminating paper forms
izin_yonetimi.benefit2: Set up flexible approval mechanisms for different leave types
izin_yonetimi.benefit3: Detect leave conflicts in advance with the alert system
izin_yonetimi.benefit4: Increase control with multi-level approval and notification processes

puantaj.name: Timesheet
puantaj.description: With AiRX's timesheet system, track employees' check-in/check-out and report situations such as tardiness, overtime, and early departures. Track leave, overtime, and flexible shifts; collect data with minimal contact via the mobile app and make the process largely autonomous.
puantaj.feat1Desc: Track employee check-ins and check-outs and reflect situations such as tardiness, overtime, and early departures in the timesheet system.
puantaj.feat2Desc: AiRX collects data from employees via the mobile app with minimal contact and high technology, making the timesheet process more autonomous.
puantaj.feat3Desc: Define flexible working hours for each employee beyond standard working hours and track timesheets seamlessly across fixed and variable shifts.
puantaj.benefit1: Report tardiness, overtime, and early departure situations
puantaj.benefit2: Track fixed and variable shifts seamlessly
puantaj.benefit3: Include break management in the timesheet process
puantaj.benefit4: Evaluate performance with location-based duration data

is_zekasi.name: Business Intelligence
is_zekasi.description: Visualize all your data with our business intelligence tools. When you can't analyze your data, you can't accurately assess the state of your company and employees — and the easiest way to analyze is through visualization.
is_zekasi.feat1Desc: Visualize different data sources within your company to more clearly assess the current state of employees and the organization.
is_zekasi.feat2Desc: In addition to the static data we provide, you can use dynamic data such as surveys, break data, and check-in/check-out data together.
is_zekasi.feat3Desc: Connect data that appears independent to create dashboards that deliver meaningful insights.
is_zekasi.benefit1: Make all data more understandable visually
is_zekasi.benefit2: Analyze static and dynamic data together
is_zekasi.benefit3: Build dashboards that generate meaningful insights
is_zekasi.benefit4: Identify the state of your company and employees more clearly

blogPost.ctaSubtitle: Request a demo and see how AiRX adapts to your organization.
